description: Several edge cases that map to safety-critical proof obligations are not surfaced as named pass-criteria. EC-S-007 (note deleted while search active) maps to REQ-FILTER-012 / PROP-FILTER-007; EC-T-004 (toggle sort while debounce pending) maps to PROP-FILTER-022/024 race-freedom; EC-C-007 (DomainSnapshotReceived while debounce mid-flight) is the only place asserting reducer-shell race freedom. Missing these from the binary pass threshold lets the Phase 3 adversary skip them. The contract should explicitly enumerate each PROP-FILTER-NNN that the criterion guards.

evidence.snippet: EC-T-004 ... EC-C-007 ... DomainSnapshotReceived while debounce mid-flight
